role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained neutral.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation, and settlement patterns consistent with the role.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific plant species (papaya, mango) and their biogeographical relevance.

role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized vehicle types and architectural styles to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the Philippines. The specialists provided strong, image-grounded evidence (papaya trees, concrete slabs, multicab vehicle) that was effectively utilized by the tournament to defeat the closest competitor (Thailand).

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of vegetation and terrain match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Concrete slabs and utility poles are accurately described.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Vehicle and building styles match the visual evidence.
